name: Mary Mancini
subject: 7,000 reasons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Hey Peter,

There are just a few hours left before tonight’s midnight deadline, and we REALLY can't do this without you.

In 2018, we mobilized 7,000 people to volunteer to elect Democrats. 7,000 people talking to their neighbors, making phone calls, and getting the word out about Democratic candidates.

7,000 people we need to keep engaged in 2019 -- so we can build and recruit 7,000 more to join us in 2020!

Please pitch in $25, $50, $100 -- or whatever you can -- before tonight's midnight deadline.

Onward,

Mary

--

Mary Mancini

Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

subject: We are counting down. Can I count on you?
body:
| | Your gift is DOUBLED with a matching grant!

* * *
Peter, We are about to ring in the New Year, but what I really need to know is if we can count on you to help us reach our critical year-end goal. **[We have an urgent need to reach our $380,000 fundraising goal TODAY! Every dollar given before 11:59 pm tonight will be DOUBLED thanks to a generous matching grant](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181231amapl01nd&n=1).** **Your donation will make it possible for My Faith Votes to:**
* Reach Christians through TV, Radio and Social media to bring their faith into their communities and our nation to see biblical values advanced
* Mobilize a force of 90-million Christians in America who will stand boldly for religious liberty, marriage and family, and the sanctity of life at their school board meetings all the way to their representatives in D.C.
* Provide Christian election resources such as Voter Guides and election reminders for _all_ elections in _all_ 50 states
* Hold elected leaders accountable to protect Constitutional rights and Biblical values at every level of government
* Unite millions of believers to PRAY fervently, THINK biblically, and ACT and VOTE consistently with a Biblical worldview to see communities transformed and our nation impacted for generations to come!

**[Can I count on you to join us in this mission? Every gift makes a difference. Dear Hoosier Republican,

Thank you! [Your support](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=26c26ff445&e=1acd9bb3d6) of the **Indiana Republican Party** was crucial to our across-the-board victories this past November – victories that will serve all Hoosiers.

These victories say Indiana remains “best in class” to employers across America and around the world. And, most importantly, these victories make the statement that Indiana is open for more high-wage, in-demand jobs that will keep this state booming and growing for years to come thanks to your service to our Party and our state! As Governor Holcomb says, our service has three priorities: People, people and people. And he is right.
---
| | **Making your[2019 Membership Renewal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6dc3007f61&e=1acd9bb3d6) before you move on from this e-mail helps us continue working for the people of Indiana -- from the small business owners who sweat making payrolls, to our veterans, seniors, young families, teachers, workers and neighbors who are the real engine that powers Indiana’s stand-out economy** **and quality of life.**
---
| As 2019 rolls in the door, [we simply CANNOT afford to rest on our laurels](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c7a3c6e38e&e=1acd9bb3d6) and ignore the growing field of increasingly left-wing Democrats looking to defeat President Donald Trump and every other Republican on Hoosier ballots. This means our work to win our elections in 2019 and again in 2020 starts now!

Elizabeth Warren, Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi and the rest of the angry mob that did all they could to sink Justice Brett Kavanaugh are back and will do anything to defeat us.
**_We only stop the “Progressives” by outworking them_.**
Make no mistake, these same out-of-state liberals who spent millions in an attempt to defeat Mike Braun will spend _ANY AMOUNT_ to defeat President Trump and our Republican candidates in 2019 and 2020.

[_So, if at all possible, please make your**2019 Annual Membership Renewal** of $25, $50 or even $100 today, and we will follow up in the mail with your personalized **2019 Indiana Republican Party Membership Card** as soon as they come off the press. _](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3568bf9a55&e=1acd9bb3d6)

As always, thank you for standing with our candidates. It is an honor to work for you and I hope to see you soon. Please also accept my best wishes for health, friendship and prosperity in the New Year!

With best regards,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

I can't believe it's already been a year.

2018 was transformative. Together, we secured the Democratic nomination, inspired a diverse coalition of voters eager for new leadership, won the General Election, helped flip the House of Representatives, and returned accountable representation back to Washington.

Not bad for 365 days!

We've been through so much together it can be difficult to recall exactly how we got where we are.

I remember when I had the distinct honor of appearing on the[ cover of TIME Magazine](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ayx3owtFivbi8YtK8e4XAzugsUKURy-DGF2kc00R0qk=/2KnsnQYwzQVMkeSp2TbTo7hBiTufzucXyygkUh0bF-4=) with so many other women inspired to run for office way back in January.

I remember when we soared to victory in the June primary thanks to supporters like you, who were tireless in our mutual pursuit of better representation for the people of Central Virginia.

I remember in October when we[ broke fundraising records](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ayx3owtFivbi8YtK8e4XAzugsUKURy-DGF2kc00R0qk=/iDFvE-4bbW7KBiCyzfq62sSYhKx5akiNWKlgDyT6ByI=) and inspired everyday citizens to invest their time, money, and effort to make sure our campaign was successful.

I remember when the closing moments of the VA07 Debate[ went viral](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ayx3owtFivbi8YtK8e4XAzugsUKURy-DGF2kc00R0qk=/ZEFTxyjJDNrVyjthfBgD2zVqLvl1OiqhxIGd2DAxbQ8=), and we made it clear that voters were hungry for a hopeful and prosperous vision for our district, our state, and our nation.

And I remember when we stood as one on Election Night, empowered, emboldened, and inspired, to [declare victory](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ayx3owtFivbi8YtK8e4XAzugsUKURy-DGF2kc00R0qk=/n4UxcB1jS3i5lmtCHAFIe-JA1DlcYqarM8dspF7zvH4=) before a cheering crowd.

But most of all, I remember you. The men and women I met in kitchens and living rooms and at libraries and firehouses. The individuals and families I spoke with at rallies and community meetings. The stories I heard and carry with me. The donors, volunteers, well-wishers and voters like you who made everything we accomplished in 2018 possible.

The year ahead is filled with promise and brimming with challenges. But we didn't embark on this journey because it was easy.

I am confident that together, there is nothing we cannot overcome; no fight too fierce, no issue too great, no debate too tough for the team we have assembled and supporters like you we have been blessed to earn.

So as you ring in the New Year this evening, I hope you will take a moment to remember everything we have accomplished so far and all that we still hope to do. I know I will.

With gratitude,

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Ayx3owtFivbi8YtK8e4XAzugsUKURy-DGF2kc00R0qk=/hl7tPtxEH3ySBA4C6BBsUGjSJMdDWETE4sB-5i7oNQY=)

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: Jane Sanders, The Sanders Institute
subject: Thank you for your support this year - here's what comes next
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Your tax-deductible donation will make a difference. # [](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a68a/bed43eb/8451e954/75fb8f3b/2619209500/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=email-header")
Dear Friend,
There is a critical need for serious ongoing analyses of the major crises we face from a progressive perspective. There is a need for a constantly updated, broadly communicated, and widely distributed policy agenda. The Sanders Institute, founded on the belief that a vital democracy requires an informed electorate, civil discourse, and bold progressive ideas, is committed to filling that vacuum.
We must unite with a sense of urgency to confront the climate crisis and to provide a decent quality of life for generations to come. We must fight for health care, affordable housing, livable wages, clean air, drinkable water, and equitable schooling. We must defend workers, democracy, and decency itself. We must fight the rise of authoritarianism and the deliberate instigation of bigotry and intolerance toward the 'other.' We must harness the value of our differences to establish powerful coalitions.
**We are planning our priorities - and considering the possibilities - for 2019 now. Your tax-deductible donation will make a difference.**

In our first year and a half, the Sanders Institute has published reports and held seminars on Medicare for All and launched the first comprehensive plan on how to pay for it. We've produced a series of videos providing clear data, analysis, and information on voting rights, the climate crisis, the federal budget, student loan debt, a federal jobs guarantee, housing initiatives, civil rights, labor issues and more.
**Recently, we brought national and international progressive leaders together to articulate a vision of democracy, shared prosperity, personal freedom, sustainability and, most importantly, human dignity - the basic tenets of a vital democracy.** Cumulatively, the live-streamed videos have already received over one million views. New alliances and collaborative agreements with progressive individuals and organizations are being formed and plans to elevate the voices of progressive people from all walks of life are being made.
**We need your support to continue this essential organizing work and to fight for our collective future.**
[**Please consider a tax-deductible contribution to the Sanders Institute - and consider getting involved in our work.**](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a68a/bed43eb/8451e954/75fb8f20/2619209500/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em181231")
Thank you for your support,
Jane O'Meara Sanders
Co-Founder / Fellow

name: Jason Yates
subject: Don’t miss your chance!
body:
| | Make a difference in 2019!

* * *
Peter, There are just hours left before the New Year! We’re asking you to include My Faith Votes in your end of year giving. **[If everyone who opened this email message chipped in $3, we could reach the goal of $380,000 to close our funding gap and build a faith-filled future in America](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl02?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181231pmapl01nd&n=1).** Your $3 donation today will enable My Faith Votes to start 2019 strong and build well for 2020. Your small investment to preserve religious liberty, the sanctity of life, and marriage and family will make a difference. Big change – cultural and generational change – doesn’t happen overnight. It begins with individual decisions to make a difference with what God has entrusted to us, starting today – right now. The best line of defense against the secular lies that are destroying the heart of America is to see Christians all across the nation rise up! Our vision is to see 90-million Christians in America stand strong for God in the public square. Through national media, church outreach, Christian University campuses, and technology, we are mobilizing millions of Christians to pray fervently, think biblically and vote consistently with a biblical worldview. For the price of a couple cups of coffee, your donation will have a tremendous impact on the future of our nation for generations to come! **[Please take advantage of this unique end of year opportunity to impact 2019 and beyond and give today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl02?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181231pmapl01nd&n=2).** **The crucial giving deadline is 11:59 PM tonight! Any amount of the matching grant that isn’t fully met today will be lost.** [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl02?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181231pmapl01nd&n=3) **United. body:

Friends, It's New Year's Eve. I'm sure you're busy preparing to ring in 2019 with your friends and loved ones -- but before you go, I have a short message for you. This community accomplished so much in 2018. We built a grassroots movement to keep AZ-01 blue and make life better for all Arizona families. I'm immensely grateful for your continued support. I hope you'll continue staying with us as we enter the next election cycle. If you can, my team says we need another 21 of you to step up by midnight tonight so we can reach our end-of-year fundraising goal and start 2019 off strong. name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Make a New Year's Revolution with me
body:
I hope you are ready to make a New Year's Revolution
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b1/bed43eb/84d9e72f/75fb898d/783403335/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
The 2020 presidential race is ramping up quickly, but we cannot jump over 2019 to get to 2020. Local and state offices are vitally important to securing a progressive blueprint for our country. In 2019, mayoral offices all across the country will be up for election. Kentucky, Louisiana, and Mississippi have governors races and state legislatures in Virginia and New Jersey are up for grabs.
[**The New Year's Revolution is kicking off. Give a $5 donation before midnight as your pledge to the revolution in 2019.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b1/bed43eb/84d9e72f/75fb898c/783403335/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2019?refcode=em181231-full&noskip=true")
2019 is going to be remembered in the history books as the year that the working families of this country came together and demanded a political revolution. But if we are going to be visionaries, if we are going to chart a new path toward social, racial, and economic equality, we cannot let up now.
With more than 600 local groups, we are launching our national Medicare for All campaign with National Nurses United, organizing grassroots efforts to elect progressives at the state and local level, and working to pass the most progressive legislation in U.S. history. Group leaders from across the country are working together to strategize how we can create long-lasting change from the neighborhood level all the way to the national level.
**[The stakes are high right now and for our political revolution to succeed we need to be laser-focused on 2019. Chip in $5 so we can create a New Year's Revolution.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b1/bed43eb/84d9e72f/75fb898c/783403335/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2019?refcode=em181231-full&noskip=true")**
In this moment, I am reminded of the words of the great abolitionist Harriet Tubman, "Every great dream begins with a dreamer. Always remember, you have within you the strength, the patience, and the passion to reach for the stars to change the world." At Our Revolution, our aim is to change the world. In order to continue this work, we need you. Join us on this journey.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b1/bed43eb/84d9e72f/75fb898c/783403335/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2019?refcode=em181231-full&noskip=true")**

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: My final ask before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Heading into 2019, we need to keep demanding better |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa663/34a064cc/45e15e4/70c6b08/1626998912/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=IE181230EOQ2&source=IE181230EOQ2")

| | | Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Lauren's note. She's right: what we built was not about me. What we built was about changing people's lives for the better. It was about meeting people where they were and pushing them to dream bigger for themselves. And it was about all of us investing in the future of our nation. But this next fight will take all of us. I can't say that we will always overcome the obstacles in our path, but I will tell you, we'll be damned if we do not try. As we head into 2019, I'm asking you to keep showing up and keep demanding better from those in power. Can I count on you to join me in this next fight and contribute to Fair Fight before midnight? You can make a contribution here: [bit.ly/Fair-Fight-2019](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa663/34a064cc/45e15e4/70c6b09/1626998912/VEsE/ "http://bit.ly/Fair-Fight-2019?utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=2+-+bitlyFairFight2019&utm_campaign=IE181230EOQ2&source=IE181230EOQ2") We can't do this without you.
- Stacey \-------Forwarded Message--------- Friend, I wanted to reach out to you before we close the books on 2018. This year, we met Georgians where they were -- in their communities across the state -- and made sure they knew that their voices mattered. That they deserved a seat at the table. And together, we built a campaign unlike anything this state has ever seen because we knew Georgians deserve better. [You were a strong supporter of our campaign, and I want to thank you for that. But this is a critical time for us as we seek to reform Georgia's election system and build a brighter Georgia. So, I'm asking you - can you make a year-end contribution to Fair Fight](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa663/34a064cc/45e15e4/70c6b16/1626998912/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE123018EOQ2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=3+-+You+were+a+strong+supporter+of+our+campa&utm_campaign=IE181230EOQ2&source=IE181230EOQ2")? The truth is that Stacey didn't transform Georgia alone. We all stepped up. And you did the incredible, often difficult, work that built the campaign of a generation. Now, it's on all of us to see that our work isn't just about one Tuesday in November. It's about ensuring every vote counts, in every election, every year. Because our right to vote is only safe when we defend it. On Tuesday, November 6, countless Georgia voters were denied their constitutional right to vote. They were left without access to free and fair elections. On Tuesday, December 4, we lost a critical battle for voting rights in a narrow defeat in the runoff for Georgia's Secretary of State. And on Tuesday, January 15, Brian Kemp, who engineered the same voter suppression tactics that were used during the Jim Crow era, will serve his second day in office as Georgia's next governor. [But before Tuesday, January 1, you have an opportunity to make a difference. Can I count on you to make a contribution to Fair Fight? I wouldn't ask if it weren't important.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa663/34a064cc/45e15e4/70c6b17/1626998912/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fair-fight-1?refcode=IE123018EOQ2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=abrams&utm_content=4+-+But+before+Tuesday+January+1+you+have+an&utm_campaign=IE181230EOQ2&source=IE181230EOQ2") Our movement has always been about more than one candidate or one campaign. Together, we can inspire nothing short of a national awakening around voting rights. Thank you for staying in the fight, Lauren

---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Banks for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jimbanks/help-me-kick-off-the-new-year?e=bfe3be83a5)

| |
---
| | Dear Friend, I couldn’t be more proud of the victory we earned together in November but it was expensive!

You answered the call, sent your strong support and I owe you a huge debt of gratitude for our win last November. But now it is time to start over. From the moment I took the oath of office in 2017, voters knew they had sent a **proven** **conservative** **leader****** to Congress and I’ve done my utmost to stand and deliver.
Nothing I’ve seen in Washington, D.C. has changed me except, I’m even more determined and passionate in my support for limited government. But something consequential DID change on Election Day and you know what it is:
**Leftist Nancy Pelosi is back as Speaker of the House and that’s disturbing**. You can count on me to work, vote, legislate, and fight as hard as I know how to stop her from bringing her Big Government-Ultra-Liberal vision to reality.
**Let’s start to re-build our “Jim Banks for Congress” campaign by bringing every member back on board.

Will you consider a contribution today of _[_$25, $50, $100 or more?_](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=93a525434f&e=bfe3be83a5)_**
Despite an avalanche of liberal money and an onslaught of attacks we were victorious in November, **_but it came at a price and we need your help to launch the New Year and send a signal to the Democrats that we will take nothing for granted the next two years. _** With Nancy Pelosi building her fundraising juggernaut to protect and expand her power in 2020, it’s vital that our Jim Banks for Congress campaign get started NOW because we’re virtually certain to be targeted for defeat again next cycle if we don't.
**Our goal is to have every member of TEAM BANKS back on board to start out the New Year**. We need to replenish our depleted campaign war chest and we’ll accomplish our crucial goal through the ongoing financial leadership of great friends like you.

**You can get us back on track by clicking [_HERE_](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=74373ee31d&e=bfe3be83a5) and help us kick off the New Year by sending a strong message. **
_Your personal contribution will be deeply appreciated!_
Respectfully yours,
Jim
